Implements console and error handling, JavaScript execution, and LED control for JerryScript on mbed.

## Folders
- **[port](port/README.md)**: Implements console, log, fatal error handling, and time functions for the JerryScript engine.

## Files
- **[jerry_extapi.cpp](jerry_extapi.cpp.md)**: Defines and registers native JavaScript handlers for assert and LED control in the JerryScript engine.
- **[jerry_extapi.h](jerry_extapi.h.md)**: Defines exit codes and declares a function to register JavaScript functions for JerryScript.
- **[jerry_run.cpp](jerry_run.cpp.md)**: Functions for initializing, parsing, evaluating, and executing JavaScript code using JerryScript.
- **[jerry_run.h](jerry_run.h.md)**: Header file declaring functions for JavaScript execution and control in an embedded environment.
- **[main.cpp](main.cpp.md)**: Initializes and runs JerryScript on an mbed platform, executing JavaScript files in a loop.
- **[makejerry.cmake](makejerry.cmake.md)**: CMake script to configure and link the JerryScript library for an mbed target with Cortex-M4 CPU.
- **[native_mbed.cpp](native_mbed.cpp.md)**: Controls LED states on an mbed platform using a specified port and value.
- **[native_mbed.h](native_mbed.h.md)**: Declares a function to control an LED on a specified port.
